prompt: Create a highly detailed anime-style background illustration of a quiet Japanese temple approach street near Jindaiji Temple approach in Chofu, Tokyo on a clear spring or early summer morning. Show a gently curving stone-paved path leading from the foreground toward a set of shrine-temple steps and a thatched-roof gate on the left, with traditional wooden shop buildings lining the right side. The main shop is a soba restaurant with dark timber beams, tiled roofs, warm paper lanterns, a blue noren curtain, menu boards, and visible Japanese signage including そば処 and 深大寺参道. Include exactly 3 prominent vertical signs: one large wooden temple-approach sign in the left foreground, one pale blue hanging banner on the right shop, and one map/information board at the far right. Add exactly 4 visible shop lanterns around the restaurant frontage. Surround the street with dense leafy green trees, shrubs, potted plants, small white flowers, mossy stones, and a shallow clear water basin or stream at the lower right reflecting sunlight. Use soft dappled light filtering through the tree canopy, realistic perspective, lush layered foliage, intricate roof tiles and wood textures, peaceful nostalgic atmosphere, no people, wide cinematic composition, 16:9 aspect ratio, painterly but crisp Studio Ghibli-inspired Japanese background art.
